creator: alexmontoanelli@gmail.com
text:
This is a NAT machine.

Working with ipnat.

Around 45k nat sessions.


Full dump here;
http://pastebin.com/Lem2qGf8

Summary:
nat1 dumped core - see /var/crash/vmcore.4

Tue Sep 20 18:24:24 BRT 2016

FreeBSD nat1 10.3-RELEASE FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE #0 r297264: Fri Mar 25 02:10:02 UTC 2016     root@releng1.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

panic: page fault
